# Build a mission

Task-focused recipes for building a mission with MAST and the `sbs_utils`
library &mdash; "how do I do X".

- [World building](world-building.md) &mdash; spawn stations, ships, and terrain
- [GUI](../cosmos/gui.md) &mdash; screens, widgets, and layout
- [Comms](../cosmos/comms.md) &mdash; hails, menus, and dialogue
- [Science](../cosmos/science.md) &mdash; scans and science handlers
- [AI](../mast/ai/index.md) &mdash; simple AI and brain trees
- [Damage](damage.md) &mdash; combat, wrecks, internal/heat damage
- [Objectives](../mast/objectives.md) &mdash; win/lose conditions
- [Quests](quests.md) &mdash; signal-driven objectives and stories
- [Items & Upgrades](items-upgrades.md) &mdash; pickups and ship upgrades
- [Web pages](web-pages.md) &mdash; author browser pages with `//web` routes

!!! tip "Community guide"
    The community-maintained
    [Mission Scripting Guide](https://github.com/artemis-sbs/mission-scripting-guide)
    collects patterns and worked examples that complement these recipes.
